subcodes.first_line: O friends! The grace of the Lord God hath thus ordained that the cup of tribulation should ever be raised for 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران فضل حضرت یزدان چنین اقتضا نمود که جام بلا بجهت عبدالبهاء همواره
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
